hero.title: Hi, I'm Gastón 👋
hero.subtitle: Front-End Developer specialized in Angular, React, Ionic and TypeScript.

about.p1: I’m a 25-year-old developer currently looking for new opportunities in Barcelona, whether hybrid or fully remote. I’m now working at a consultancy while waiting to join a new client project.
about.p2: I completed a Higher National Diploma in Web Application Development (DAW) in L’Hospitalet de Llobregat with an excellent final grade. Programming is more than a job for me — it’s my hobby and my passion.
about.p3: I have 5 years of professional experience, and although I enjoy Front-End development the most, I also have solid Back-End skills.
about.p4: I’ve worked on modern and exciting projects: at Averlance, where we built a smart-fridge system now expanding across Europe; and at Vueling, where I contributed to core pages such as the Home and the booking status flows.
about.p5: My strongest skill is Angular — any version — and I also work confidently with Ionic for mobile app development. I’ve completed several courses, including RxJS, React, Python, and more.
about.p6: I adapt quickly to any programming language and always give 100%. I’ve built personal projects in React, and I’ve also worked with Python, Spring Boot, Java, Android, and even Swift for iOS.
about.p7: I integrate easily into any team, communicate well, and I’m highly organized, dedicated, and committed to delivering my best in every project.
about.skills_frontend: Angular · React · Ionic · TypeScript · HTML · CSS
about.skills_backend: Spring Boot · Java · NodeJS · PHP · Python
about.skills_mobile: React Native · Ionic · Android · Swift (iOS) · MySQL · DevOps basics
